infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PokouAI needs camera access to photograph cocoa pods for disease diagnosis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PokouAI needs photo library access to analyze existing photos of cocoa pods.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PokouAI uses the microphone to record your hypothesis as a voice memo before treating.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PokouAI to access your camera to photograph cocoa pods.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PokouAI to access your photo library.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow PokouAI to record your voice hypothesis.
